localizations.subject: Payment received for order {{order.orderNumber}}
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, we received your payment for order {{order.orderNumber}} at {{store.name}}. Total paid: {{order.total}}. Line items: {{order.itemsSummary}}. Thank you.

localizations.subject: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} のお支払いを確認しました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、{{store.name}} にて注文 {{order.orderNumber}} のお支払いを確認しました。お支払い合計: {{order.total}}。明細: {{order.itemsSummary}}。ご利用ありがとうございます。

localizations.subject: 已收到訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 的付款
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，{{store.name}} 已收到您對訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 的付款。付款總額：{{order.total}}。品項：{{order.itemsSummary}}。感謝您的支持。

localizations.subject: Order {{order.orderNumber}} is paid
localizations.body: Order {{order.orderNumber}} has been paid by {{customer.name}}. Total: {{order.total}}. Line items: {{order.itemsSummary}}. Please proceed with fulfillment.

localizations.subject: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} の入金を確認
localizations.body: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} の入金を確認しました。顧客: {{customer.name}}。合計: {{order.total}}。明細: {{order.itemsSummary}}。対応を進めてください。

localizations.subject: 訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 已付款
localizations.body: 訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 已由 {{customer.name}} 完成付款。總額：{{order.total}}。品項：{{order.itemsSummary}}。請開始後續履約作業。

localizations.subject: Order {{order.orderNumber}} has been cancelled
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, your order {{order.orderNumber}} was cancelled. If payment was captured, refund details will be sent separately.

localizations.subject: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} はキャンセルされました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、注文 {{order.orderNumber}} はキャンセルされました。決済済みの場合、返金情報は別途ご案内します。

localizations.subject: 訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 已取消
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，您的訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 已取消。若款項已收取，退款資訊將另行通知。

localizations.subject: Order {{order.orderNumber}} cancelled
localizations.body: Order {{order.orderNumber}} for {{customer.name}} was cancelled. Please stop preparation and review follow-up actions.

localizations.subject: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} がキャンセルされました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様の注文 {{order.orderNumber}} はキャンセルされました。準備を停止し、必要な後続対応を確認してください。

localizations.subject: 訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 已取消
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 的訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 已取消。請停止準備，並確認後續處理事項。

localizations.subject: Refund processed for order {{order.orderNumber}}
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, your refund for order {{order.orderNumber}} has been processed. Refund amount: {{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}}.

localizations.subject: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} の返金が完了しました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、注文 {{order.orderNumber}} の返金処理が完了しました。返金額: {{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}}。

localizations.subject: 訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 退款已完成
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，您的訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 退款已完成。退款金額：{{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}}。

localizations.subject: Refund completed for order {{order.orderNumber}}
localizations.body: Refund has been completed for order {{order.orderNumber}}. Customer: {{customer.name}}. Amount: {{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}}.

localizations.subject: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} の返金完了
localizations.body: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} の返金が完了しました。顧客: {{customer.name}}。金額: {{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}}。

localizations.subject: 訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 退款完成
localizations.body: 訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 的退款已完成。顧客：{{customer.name}}。金額：{{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}}。

localizations.subject: Order {{order.orderNumber}} completed
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, your order {{order.orderNumber}} is completed. Thank you for choosing {{store.name}}.

localizations.subject: 注文 {{order.orderNumber}} が完了しました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、注文 {{order.orderNumber}} は完了しました。{{store.name}} をご利用いただきありがとうございます。

localizations.subject: 訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 已完成
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，您的訂單 {{order.orderNumber}} 已完成。感謝您選擇 {{store.name}}。

localizations.subject: Account top-up completed
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, your account top-up is completed at {{store.name}}. Reference order: {{order.orderNumber}}. Amount: {{order.total}}.

localizations.subject: アカウントチャージが完了しました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、{{store.name}} でのアカウントチャージが完了しました。参照注文: {{order.orderNumber}}。金額: {{order.total}}。

localizations.subject: 儲值已完成
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，您在 {{store.name}} 的帳戶儲值已完成。參考訂單：{{order.orderNumber}}。金額：{{order.total}}。

localizations.subject: Reservation {{reservation.id}} updated
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, your reservation has been updated. New status: {{reservation.status}} (previous: {{reservation.previousStatus}}). Time: {{reservation.dateTime}}.

localizations.subject: 予約 {{reservation.id}} が更新されました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約内容が更新されました。新しいステータス: {{reservation.status}}（前回: {{reservation.previousStatus}}）。日時: {{reservation.dateTime}}。

localizations.subject: 預約 {{reservation.id}} 已更新
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，您的預約已更新。新狀態：{{reservation.status}}（前一狀態：{{reservation.previousStatus}}）。時間：{{reservation.dateTime}}。

localizations.subject: Reservation {{reservation.id}} cancelled
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, your reservation has been cancelled. If applicable, refund: {{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}}.

localizations.subject: 予約 {{reservation.id}} はキャンセルされました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約 {{reservation.id}} はキャンセルされました。必要に応じて返金額: {{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}} をご確認ください。

localizations.subject: 預約 {{reservation.id}} 已取消
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，您的預約 {{reservation.id}} 已取消。若有適用退款，金額為：{{reservation.refundAmount}} {{reservation.refundCurrency}}。

localizations.subject: Reservation {{reservation.id}} cancelled
localizations.body: Reservation {{reservation.id}} has been cancelled by {{actor.name}}. Please release the slot and update internal planning.

localizations.subject: 予約 {{reservation.id}} がキャンセルされました
localizations.body: 予約 {{reservation.id}} は {{actor.name}} によりキャンセルされました。枠を解放し、内部計画を更新してください。

localizations.subject: 預約 {{reservation.id}} 已取消
localizations.body: 預約 {{reservation.id}} 已由 {{actor.name}} 取消。請釋放時段並更新內部排程。

localizations.subject: Reservation {{reservation.id}} removed
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, reservation {{reservation.id}} has been removed. Contact {{store.name}} if this was unexpected.

localizations.subject: 予約 {{reservation.id}} は削除されました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約 {{reservation.id}} は削除されました。心当たりがない場合は {{store.name}} までご連絡ください。

localizations.subject: 預約 {{reservation.id}} 已移除
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，預約 {{reservation.id}} 已移除。如非您預期，請聯繫 {{store.name}}。

localizations.subject: Reservation confirmed by {{store.name}}
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, your reservation {{reservation.id}} is confirmed by {{store.name}}. See details: {{reservation.actionUrl}}.

localizations.subject: {{store.name}} が予約を確認しました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約 {{reservation.id}} は {{store.name}} により確認されました。詳細: {{reservation.actionUrl}}。

localizations.subject: {{store.name}} 已確認您的預約
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，您的預約 {{reservation.id}} 已由 {{store.name}} 確認。查看詳情：{{reservation.actionUrl}}。

localizations.subject: Reservation confirmation received
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, we received your confirmation for reservation {{reservation.id}}. We look forward to serving you.

localizations.subject: 予約確認を受け付けました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約 {{reservation.id}} の確認を受け付けました。ご来店をお待ちしております。

localizations.subject: 已收到您的預約確認
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，我們已收到您對預約 {{reservation.id}} 的確認，期待為您服務。

localizations.subject: Customer confirmed reservation {{reservation.id}}
localizations.body: Customer {{customer.name}} confirmed reservation {{reservation.id}}. Please continue service preparation.

localizations.subject: 顧客が予約 {{reservation.id}} を確認
localizations.body: 顧客 {{customer.name}} が予約 {{reservation.id}} を確認しました。サービス準備を継続してください。

localizations.subject: 顧客已確認預約 {{reservation.id}}
localizations.body: 顧客 {{customer.name}} 已確認預約 {{reservation.id}}。請持續進行服務準備。

localizations.subject: Reservation payment received
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, payment for reservation {{reservation.id}} is received. Amount: {{reservation.paymentAmount}} {{reservation.paymentCurrency}}.

localizations.subject: 予約のお支払いを確認しました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約 {{reservation.id}} のお支払いを確認しました。金額: {{reservation.paymentAmount}} {{reservation.paymentCurrency}}。

localizations.subject: 已收到預約付款
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，預約 {{reservation.id}} 的付款已收到。金額：{{reservation.paymentAmount}} {{reservation.paymentCurrency}}。

localizations.subject: Your reservation is ready
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, reservation {{reservation.id}} is now ready. See details: {{reservation.actionUrl}}.

localizations.subject: ご予約の準備が整いました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約 {{reservation.id}} の準備が整いました。詳細: {{reservation.actionUrl}}。

localizations.subject: 您的預約已準備就緒
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，預約 {{reservation.id}} 已準備就緒。查看詳情：{{reservation.actionUrl}}。

localizations.subject: Customer checked in
localizations.body: Customer {{customer.name}} checked in for reservation {{reservation.id}}. Check-in code: {{reservation.checkInCode}}.

localizations.subject: 顧客がチェックインしました
localizations.body: 顧客 {{customer.name}} が予約 {{reservation.id}} でチェックインしました。チェックインコード: {{reservation.checkInCode}}。

localizations.subject: 顧客已完成報到
localizations.body: 顧客 {{customer.name}} 已完成預約 {{reservation.id}} 的報到。報到碼：{{reservation.checkInCode}}。

localizations.subject: Reservation completed
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, reservation {{reservation.id}} is completed. Thank you for visiting {{store.name}}.

localizations.subject: 予約が完了しました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約 {{reservation.id}} は完了しました。{{store.name}} をご利用いただきありがとうございました。

localizations.subject: 預約已完成
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，預約 {{reservation.id}} 已完成。感謝您蒞臨 {{store.name}}。

localizations.subject: Reservation marked no-show
localizations.body: Hi {{customer.name}}, reservation {{reservation.id}} was marked as no-show. Contact {{store.name}} if this needs correction.

localizations.subject: 予約は無断キャンセルとして記録されました
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 様、予約 {{reservation.id}} は無断キャンセルとして記録されました。誤りがある場合は {{store.name}} までご連絡ください。

localizations.subject: 預約已標記為未到場
localizations.body: {{customer.name}} 您好，預約 {{reservation.id}} 已標記為未到場。若需更正，請聯繫 {{store.name}}。

localizations.subject: Upcoming reservation reminder
localizations.body: Reminder: reservation {{reservation.id}} is scheduled at {{reservation.dateTime}}. Facility: {{reservation.facilityName}}.

localizations.subject: ご予約リマインド
localizations.body: リマインド: 予約 {{reservation.id}} は {{reservation.dateTime}} です。施設: {{reservation.facilityName}}。

localizations.subject: 預約提醒通知
localizations.body: 提醒您：預約 {{reservation.id}} 於 {{reservation.dateTime}} 進行。設施：{{reservation.facilityName}}。

localizations.subject: Upcoming reservation reminder
localizations.body: Reminder: reservation {{reservation.id}} for {{customer.name}} is scheduled at {{reservation.dateTime}}.

localizations.subject: 予約リマインド
localizations.body: リマインド: 顧客 {{customer.name}} の予約 {{reservation.id}} は {{reservation.dateTime}} です。

localizations.subject: 預約提醒通知
localizations.body: 提醒：{{customer.name}} 的預約 {{reservation.id}} 於 {{reservation.dateTime}} 進行。
